headline: Seagate Mozaic 4 Plus HAMR Launch Ties Into Hyperscale Valuation Story
summary: Seagate Technology Holdings (NasdaqGS:STX) has launched its next-generation Mozaic 4+ HAMR-based storage platform. The company reports that Mozaic 4+ has reached volume production and has been qualified with leading hyperscale cloud providers. The platform is designed to support higher storage densities and data center efficiency for large-scale cloud and AI workloads. Seagate, a major supplier of hard disk drives and storage systems, is closely linked to trends in cloud computing and AI...
